message:
perf(a11y): respect reduced motion in 3D scene, secure external links

three-scene:
- Honor prefersReducedMotion system preference
- Disable autoRotate and manual rotate when user prefers reduced motion
- Set frameloop to "demand" instead of "always" for reduced motion
- Skip PerformanceMonitor when animation is disabled
- Reduces CPU/GPU usage for users who opt out of motion

command-palette:
- Use noopener,noreferrer for external link security
- Extract openExternal helper to centralize external link handling
- Prevents potential tabnabbing attacks via window.opener

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
